'''lapugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fogbank|fogbank]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-p-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fogbank|fogbank]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lapugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læpigith|læpigith]] || [[word:læpigij|læpigij]] || [[word:læpigish|læpigish]] || [[word:læpigi|læpigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lapupuguth|lapupuguth]] || [[word:lapupuguj|lapupuguj]] || [[word:lapupugush|lapupugush]] || [[word:lapupugu|lapupugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lapuguth|lapuguth]] || [[word:lapuguj|lapuguj]] || [[word:lapugush|lapugush]] || [[word:lapugu|lapugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lapufguth|lapufguth]] || [[word:lapufguj|lapufguj]] || [[word:lapufgush|lapufgush]] || [[word:lapufguf|lapufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lapuguthu|lapuguthu]] || [[word:lapuguju|lapuguju]] || [[word:lapugushu|lapugushu]] || [[word:lapuguku|lapuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lapuguth|lapuguth]] || [[word:lapuguj|lapuguj]] || [[word:lapugush|lapugush]] || [[word:lapugu|lapugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lapuguthul|lapuguthul]] || [[word:lapugujul|lapugujul]] || [[word:lapugushul|lapugushul]] || [[word:lapugukul|lapugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lapuguthuthu|lapuguthuthu]] || [[word:lapugujuju|lapugujuju]] || [[word:lapugushushu|lapugushushu]] || [[word:lapuguku|lapuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lapuguthun|lapuguthun]] || [[word:lapugujun|lapugujun]] || [[word:lapugushun|lapugushun]] || [[word:lapugukun|lapugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lapuguthuoro|lapuguthuoro]] || [[word:lapugujuoro|lapugujuoro]] || [[word:lapugushuoro|lapugushuoro]] || [[word:lapugukuoro|lapugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
